name: Panamanian Golden Frog
conservationEfforts: Likely extinct in the wild due to chytrid fungus. Project Golden Frog maintains captive populations in over 50 institutions. Panama's national animal and cultural icon.
description: A brilliant yellow frog that is Panama's national symbol. Chytrid fungus has devastated wild populations and it may now be extinct in the wild, surviving only in captive breeding programs.
